general_health.description: Foods that promote overall well-being and maintain bodily functions.

foods.name: Leafy Greens
foods.benefit: Rich in vitamins A, C, and K; support immune function and bone health.

foods.name: Whole Grains
foods.benefit: Provide essential fibers and help regulate blood sugar levels.

skin_health.description: Nutrients that specifically benefit skin appearance and function.

foods.name: Fatty Fish
foods.benefit: High in omega-3 fatty acids; reduce inflammation and keep skin moisturized.

foods.name: Nuts and Seeds
foods.benefit: Contain vitamin E and zinc; protect skin from oxidative damage.

science.nutrient_synergy: Combining vitamin C-rich foods with iron-rich foods enhances iron absorption, benefiting overall health.
